title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE NAIPIT COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF BULAUAN, MUNICIPALITY OF PRIETO DIAZ, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO BULAUAN COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1823 / 50 OG No. 6, 2390 (June, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1036, June 12, 1954 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE NAIPIT COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF BULAUAN, MUNICIPALITY OF PRIETO DIAZ, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, TO BULAUAN COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Naipit Community School in the barrio of Bulauan, municipality of Prieto Diaz, Province of Sorsogon, is hereby changed to Bulauan Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
